5.anchor: he saved us, not because of the righteous things we had done, but because of his mercy. He washed away our sins, giving us a new birth and new life through the Holy Spirit.
5.note: Greek He saved us through the washing of regeneration and renewing of the Holy Spirit.

9.anchor: Do not get involved in foolish discussions about spiritual pedigrees

3.anchor: Similarly, teach the older women to live in a way that honors God. They must not slander others or be heavy drinkers.
3.note: Greek be enslaved to much wine.

5.anchor: to live wisely and be pure, to work in their homes,
5.note: Some manuscripts read to care for their homes.

1.anchor: This letter is from Paul, a slave of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I have been sent to proclaim faith to
1.note: Or to strengthen the faith of.

6.anchor: An elder must live a blameless life. He must be faithful to his wife,
6.note: Or must have only one wife, must be married only once; must be the husband of one wife.

7.anchor: is a manager of God’s household, so he must live a blameless life. He must not be arrogant or quick-tempered; he must not be a heavy drinker,
7.note: Greek must not drink too much wine.

12.anchor: Even one of their own men, a prophet from Crete, has said about them, “The people of Crete are all liars, cruel animals, and lazy gluttons.”
12.note: This quotation is from Epimenides of Knossos.
